calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Mark Poliner, plaintiff's Custodian of Records, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Boontiong T. Ho.
Default entered against defendant on July 30,2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 30, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Boontiong T. Ho as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,503.36.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,972.27.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $434.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $31,909.63.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
